text_original:
Clear and to be preserved bright,
Are the statutes of king Wăn.
From the first sacrifice (to him),
Till now when they have issued in our complete state,
They have been the happy omen of (the fortunes of) Kâu.
text_normalized:
Clear and to be preserved bright,
Are the statutes of king Wăn.
From the first sacrifice (to him),
Till now when they have issued in our complete state,
They have been the happy omen of (the fortunes of) Kâu.
